zh.lifeSummary: Clement Burrogh是Sir William Borrough的女兒，出生。她和*E John le ESTRANGE至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Clement Burrogh是Sir William Borrough的女儿，出生。她和*E John le ESTRANGE至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Burrogh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Burrow
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a castle or manor house, or in a town, especially a chartered town or borough (Middle English burgh, Old English burg ‘fortified place, borough, manor’), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named because it was a fortified town or near an ancient fort, such as Burrow (Leicestershire, Lancashire), Burrough Green (Cambridgeshire), Brough (numerous counties), and Peterborough (Northamptonshire); see also Burgh .

topographic name for someone who lived on a hill or near a mound (Middle English bergh, Old English beorg), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, such as Burrow (Devon, Somerset). Middle English bergh became throughly confused with burgh in 1 above. Compare Burrough .

nameMeanings.name: Clement
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Clemens (genitive Clementis) meaning ‘merciful’. This was borne by several early saints, notably the fourth pope and the early Christian theologian Clement of Alexandria (Titus Flavius Clemens, ad ?150–?215 ).

en.lifeSummary: Clement Burrogh was born as the daughter of Sir William Borrough. She had at least 1 daughter with *E John le ESTRANGE.

fr.lifeSummary: Clement Burrogh est née, fille de Sir William Borrough. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec *E John le ESTRANGE.

de.lifeSummary: Clement Burrogh wurde, als Tochter von Sir William Borrough geboren. Sie hatte mit *E John le ESTRANGE mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Clement Burrogh è nata il come figlia di Sir William Borrough. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con *E John le ESTRANGE.

ja.lifeSummary: Clement BurroghはSir William Borroughの娘として生まれた。彼女は*E John le ESTRANGEとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Clement Burrogh(은)는 Sir William Borrough의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 *E John le ESTRANGE(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Clement Burrogh nasceu filha de Sir William Borrough. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com *E John le ESTRANGE.

ru.lifeSummary: Clement Burrogh родилась. Её отца звали Sir William Borrough. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от *E John le ESTRANGE.

es.lifeSummary: Clement Burrogh nació como hija de Sir William Borrough. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con *E John le ESTRANGE.
